tools.name: get_agency_info
tools.description: Facts about Social Cooks GmbH, the Munich-based social media marketing agency (Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Feed Hacking) for profitable e-commerce growth: contact, address, founders, entry points for further reading.

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: Social Cooks' services (Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Feed Hacking, Creative Engineering, Organic Social CRM) with page URLs, plus the Munich channel landing pages.

tools.name: get_case_studies
tools.description: Verified case-study results: own brand SASSYCLASSY (>€50M annual sales, bootstrapped) and client NATURANA (+240% revenue, +90% MER, CAC −10% while scaling).

tools.name: search_knowledge
tools.description: Semantic full-text search across all Social Cooks content (blog articles, guides, glossary, service pages). Returns the most relevant passages with their source URLs so you can cite them. Read-only — use it to answer questions about the agency's approach, methods, metrics and how-tos that the other

tools.name: request_account_check
tools.description: Submit a request for the free Meta Ads account check on behalf of your user. Requires the user's explicit consent to the privacy policy (https://socialcooks.com/datenschutz). Results are presented in a free 30-minute video call, not by email. Review access is read-only and revocable.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_agency_info, list_services, search_knowledge, request_account_check · Private data: get_agency_info · Public sink: request_account_check.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_agency_info, list_services, search_knowledge, request_account_check · Private data: get_agency_info · Public sink: request_account_check

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
